creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: swills
Date: Fri Dec 20 16:10:00 2013
New Revision: 337031
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/337031

Log:
  MFH: r337025
  
  - Fix RUN_DEPENDS
  - Use PYTHON_SITELIBDIR
  - Remove directories installed by lang/python* from plist
  
  PR:		ports/181383
  Submitted by:	lwhsu
  Approved by:	portmgr-lurkers (mat)

Modified:
  branches/2014Q1/net/py-ec2-cli-tools/Makefile
  branches/2014Q1/net/py-ec2-cli-tools/pkg-plist
Directory Properties:
  branches/2014Q1/   (props changed)

Modified: branches/2014Q1/net/py-ec2-cli-tools/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- branches/2014Q1/net/py-ec2-cli-tools/Makefile	Fri Dec 20 16:08:37 2013	(r337030)
+++ branches/2014Q1/net/py-ec2-cli-tools/Makefile	Fri Dec 20 16:10:00 2013	(r337031)
@@ -3,6 +3,7 @@
 
 PORTNAME=	ec2-cli-tools
 PORTVERSION=	1.4
+PORTREVISION=	1
 CATEGORIES=	net python
 MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
@@ -10,7 +11,7 @@ PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
 MAINTAINER=	swills@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Helpful CLI utilities for querying and connecting to EC2 instances
 
-RUN_DEPENDS+=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}boto=>1.0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-boto
+RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}boto>=1.0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-boto
 
 USE_PYTHON=		yes
 USE_PYDISTUTILS=	easy_install

Modified: branches/2014Q1/net/py-ec2-cli-tools/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- branches/2014Q1/net/py-ec2-cli-tools/pkg-plist	Fri Dec 20 16:08:37 2013	(r337030)
+++ branches/2014Q1/net/py-ec2-cli-tools/pkg-plist	Fri Dec 20 16:10:00 2013	(r337031)
@@ -1,9 +1,7 @@
-%%PYTHON_LIBDIR%%/site-packages/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%
 bin/ec2getsnaps
 bin/ec2host
 bin/ec2hostcache
 bin/ec2ssh
 bin/ec2sshproxy
 bin/ec2who
-@dirrm %%PYTHON_LIBDIR%%/site-packages
-@dirrm %%PYTHON_LIBDIR%%
